reviews.review_description: There's only three levels, even though I have maxed out everything it's the same thing over and over again it gets a little monotonous. I hope they add more levels. Three levels is not enough. Nice little game, though. I hope they add more levels and more doctors.make them work a little bit better than they are doing.

developer_response.body: You're welcome for your feedback. Our game will be updated in the future. Our goal is to ensure you have an enjoyable experience.
